nodejs.name: Syslog Client
nodejs.description: Send BSB logs to remote syslog servers over UDP, TCP, or TLS. Supports RFC 3164 and RFC 5424 formats with facility and severity mapping.

nodejs.name: Syslog Server
nodejs.description: Receive and process syslog messages over UDP/TCP with RFC 3164 and RFC 5424 compliance. Perfect for centralized logging infrastructure.
